rationale: The main alert (A0) shows 'sc.exe' modifying the Fax service's binary path to execute PowerShell. EV-001 and EV-002 show 'sc.exe' creating and starting a new service '[x]_CMD' with a suspicious binary path. EV-003 shows PowerShell creating and starting another service '[x]_PowerShell' with a similar suspicious binary path. EV-004 confirms the execution of the suspicious binary 'C:\[x]\[x]\[id]\bin\[x].exe' under the SYSTEM user, indicating successful persistence and privilege escalation. While EV-005 shows the Fax service being reverted, the creation and execution of other services with suspicious binaries remain.
